intro: Galium rubrum, also known as Red Bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Galium genus, known for its ability to thrive in damp, moist environments. The health benefits of Galium rubrum include its potential anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which may aid in treating various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and gastrointestinal issues.
